productDisplayName: Nike Men Wilderness Black Red Sandal
description: Perfect for casual wear, this flaoter from Nshort trips, the nike Wilderness sandals will keep you on your feet all the time.UpperSynthetic straps for durability and easy maintenance Cloth lining for snug and comfortable Fit on the foot Velcro closures for a snug, customised fitRidges in wave pattern on the cushioned PU footbed to allow air flow and support accupressure MidsoleEVA midsole for lightweight feel and shock absorptionOutsoleLugs in reverse leaf pattern for absolute gripFlaoter careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
